scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy && npm run scss-build && npm run ts-compile
scripts.copy: shx mkdir -p dist && shx cp src/index.html dist/index.html && shx cp -r src/html/* dist/ && shx cp -r src/assets dist/assets
scripts.ts-compile: tsc || echo "TypeScript errors ignored for deploy"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run ts" "npm run scss" "npm run serve"
